response.justification: Bogdan has an extensive technical background with over 15 years of software engineering experience and strong expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines. However, the resume lacks any evidence of formal people management, direct reports, or conducting performance evaluations, which are core minimum requirements for this mid-to-senior engineering management position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, easily exceeding the 8-year minimum requirement.
Significant hands-on experience building developer tools, test runners, and CI/CD infrastructure.
Demonstrated mobile platform knowledge through iOS and Apple TV application development.
concerns: No documented experience in formal people management, team leadership, or conducting performance reviews.
Career trajectory is strictly focused on Individual Contributor (IC) roles rather than engineering management.
Lacks evidence of leading broad organizational change, a preferred qualification for this role.
